response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, but the resume shows no evidence of CTO-level leadership, no track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+, no production multi-agent AI systems, and no fintech-infrastructure or regulated-environment experience at the depth required. The role is an executive position requiring 5+ years senior technical leadership and demonstrated production agentic-AI ownership, neither of which is present.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, backend, and distributed systems
Some recent agentic-AI/MCP tooling exposure at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No executive or engineering-management leadership experience; no evidence of scaling teams to 30+
No production multi-agent AI systems or LLM evaluation/observability infrastructure ownership
No fintech-infrastructure, credit-risk, or regulated-environment background

key_factors.factor: Lacks senior leadership / team scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
